title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Integrate local LLMs into Python apps with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama. Works in Node.js and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration for Ollama. Plug local Ollama models into LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama. Open-source alternative to ChatGPT interface running 100% locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama. Idiomatic Java client with builder-style API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenience CLI wrapper adding prompts, templates, and bulk model management on top of ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Use Ollama models as GitHub Copilot replacement in VS Code via Copilot Chat API.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers queries using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code, docs, and refactor using Ollama models without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth, rate limiting, and usage logging to Ollama.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with Tokio.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams query local Ollama models from any channel or DM.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-rustic
summary: Alternative Rust client focused on ergonomic macros and compile-time model verification.

title: ollama-kt
summary: Kotlin multiplatform SDK for Ollama targeting JVM, Android, and native desktop.
